<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/fundingSource/getDisplayName/realmId/{realmId}/name/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the display name for a funding source by its realm ID and name.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

>
</Heading>
